    • addRecipient

    • removeRecipient

      public int removeRecipient(Character toRemove) throws Exception
      Removes a recipient (without any votes) from this vote.
      Parameters:
      toRemove - Character to remove as a possible recipient
      Returns:
      The former number of votes for this recipient (always 0)
      Throws:
      Exception - If the recipient has counted votes. In this case, use removeRecipient(Character, Character)
      See Also:
      • removeRecipient(Character, Character)

    • removeRecipient

      public int removeRecipient(Character toRemove, Character toEndorse)
      Remove a recipient and transfer votes to another endorsed recipient. Call will null to waste the votes.
      Parameters:
      toRemove - Character to be removed from the vote.
      toEndorse - Character to transfer the votes to from the removed Character.
      Returns:
      Total votes of the removed Character

    • participated

      public boolean participated(Character participant)

    • getVotesFor

      public int getVotesFor(Character recipient)
